description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a roughly oval profile and a faceted, angular surface. The rock displays a predominantly light gray coloration with subtle variations in tone, including some darker gray patches near the base. Its surface texture appears rough and unpolished, with visible facets and natural weathering marks. The rock's form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing slightly flatter and broader, while the opposite side tapers more sharply. There are no visible carvings, graffiti, or artificial modifications on its surface. This rock would be well-suited as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park, roadside, or landscaped area.
description: A medium-sized, irregularly shaped light gray rock with a rough, faceted surface and subtle tonal variations. Its asymmetrical form and natural texture make it suitable as an urban barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and rounded, with a slightly flattened base and darker gray shading along the lower edge.
description_view_1: This view shows the rock's more tapered side, highlighting its angular facets and a pointed lower section.
description_view_2: The rock looks more upright and oval, with a smoother, lighter surface and less pronounced angularity.
description_view_3: The rock's side is more elongated and narrow, with visible surface texture and a subtle taper toward the bottom.
